mechanism_narrative: A rise in the unemployment rate signals a weakening labor market, which compresses consumer spending and leads to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 1-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in late-cycle periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the housing market signals a decrease in demand for new construction, which leads to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.05 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in housing-market-downturn periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in industrial production signals a decrease in supply, which leads to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.01 over any 1-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in post-shock-recovery periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the retail sales signal a strengthening demand for consumer goods, which leads to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in monetary-tightening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the labor force participation rate signals a strengthening labor market, which leads to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.01 over any 1-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in late-cycle periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the consumer price index signals a decrease in inflation expectations, which leads to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.05 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in housing-market-downturn periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle, which leads to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in monetary-easing periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the unemployment rate signals a weakening labor market, which leads to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.01 over any 1-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in post-shock-recovery periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
